[DQC.US.0045.6836] The concept us-gaap:ProceedsFromNotesPayable appears in the investing cashflows of the companies cash flow statement. us-gaap:ProceedsFromNotesPayable is a financing item and it is expected that this item would only appear in the cash flow generated from financing activities. Please review the calculations defined for the cash flow statement to determine that the correct element has been used for this item.
